skill.name: python-fastapi-development
skill.description: Python FastAPI backend development with async patterns, SQLAlchemy, Pydantic, authentication, and production API patterns.
skill.summary: Build production-ready Python backends with FastAPI using async patterns, SQLAlchemy ORM, and comprehensive API development workflows.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Security audit completed. All static findings are false positives. The 'external_commands' flagged lines are skill references (@skill-name) not shell executions. The 'weak cryptographic algorithm' flags are markdown references, not code. This is a legitimate FastAPI development workflow documentation file with no actual security risks.

content.value_statement: This skill provides a comprehensive workflow for building production-ready Python FastAPI backends with database integration, authentication, testing, and deployment patterns.
actual_capabilities: Scaffold new FastAPI projects with proper structure
Set up SQLAlchemy ORM with PostgreSQL database
Create RESTful API endpoints with CRUD operations
Configure error handling and logging patterns
Build testable FastAPI applications with pytest
limitations: Does not execute code - provides guidance and prompts only
Requires other specialized skills for full workflow
Does not provision actual cloud infrastructure

use_cases.title: New FastAPI Project Setup
use_cases.description: Quickly scaffold a new FastAPI project with proper structure, logging, and environment configuration.

use_cases.title: Database Integration
use_cases.description: Set up SQLAlchemy models, migrations, and database connections for production applications.

use_cases.title: Complete API Development
use_cases.description: Follow a structured 8-phase workflow from project setup to deployment.

prompt_templates.title: Start New FastAPI Project
prompt_templates.prompt: Use @python-fastapi-development to scaffold a new FastAPI project with SQLAlchemy and JWT authentication.
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginning a new FastAPI backend project

prompt_templates.title: Add Database Models
prompt_templates.prompt: Use @python-fastapi-development to set up SQLAlchemy models for a user authentication system with PostgreSQL.
prompt_templates.scenario: Adding database layer to existing project

prompt_templates.title: Create API Endpoints
prompt_templates.prompt: Use @python-fastapi-development to create RESTful API endpoints with CRUD operations for a items resource.
prompt_templates.scenario: Building API routes for resource management

prompt_templates.title: Full Stack FastAPI App
prompt_templates.prompt: Use @python-fastapi-development to build a complete FastAPI application with authentication, database, testing, and Docker deployment.

output_examples.input: Use @python-fastapi-development to scaffold a new FastAPI project
output_examples.output:
This skill provides a structured 8-phase workflow:

Phase 1: Project Setup
- Skills: app-builder, python-scaffold, fastapi-templates
- Actions: Environment setup, project structure, FastAPI config

Phase 2: Database Setup
- Skills: database-design, pydantic-models
- Actions: Schema design, SQLAlchemy models, migrations

[Continues through all 8 phases...]

output_examples.input: What phases does the FastAPI development workflow include?
output_examples.output:
The workflow includes 8 phases:
1. Project Setup
2. Database Setup
3. API Routes
4. Authentication
5. Error Handling
6. Testing
7. Documentation
8. Deployment

best_practices: Use async patterns with SQLAlchemy 2.0 for better performance
Always validate input with Pydantic models
Implement proper error handling with custom exceptions
anti_patterns: Do not skip type hints - they improve code maintainability
Do not use synchronous database calls in async endpoints
Do not store secrets in code - use environment variables

faq.question: What version of FastAPI does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill supports FastAPI with Python 3.11+ and is compatible with SQLAlchemy 2.0 and Pydantic v2.

faq.question: Does this skill write code for me?
faq.answer: No. This skill provides workflow guidance and prompts to invoke other specialized skills that generate code.

faq.question: Can I use this skill with other databases?
faq.answer: Yes. The workflow is designed for PostgreSQL but can be adapted for other databases supported by SQLAlchemy.

faq.question: What authentication methods are covered?
faq.answer: The workflow covers JWT authentication and OAuth2 implementation patterns.

faq.question: Is Docker deployment included?
faq.answer: Yes. Phase 8 covers Dockerfile creation, docker-compose setup, and cloud deployment patterns.

faq.question: Can Claude Code use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. This skill is compatible with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code tools.
